2026-04-20T02:36:01.0543166Z ##[group]Run actions/github-script@373c709c69115d41ff229c7e5df9f8788daa9553
2026-04-20T02:36:01.0543899Z with:
2026-04-20T02:36:01.0548044Z   script: const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
  core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
  return;
}

const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };

const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
  await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
  core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
}

await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
  ...repo,
  workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
  ref: 'main',
  inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
});
core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-20T02:36:01.0552882Z   github-token: ***
2026-04-20T02:36:01.0553329Z   debug: false
2026-04-20T02:36:01.0553734Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
2026-04-20T02:36:01.0554235Z   result-encoding: json
2026-04-20T02:36:01.0554641Z   retries: 0

2026-04-20T02:36:01.0555805Z env:
2026-04-20T02:36:01.0556178Z   CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: 58349

It is scheduled to be removed on Fri, 10 Mar 2028 00:00:00 GMT. See https://docs.github.com/en/rest/about-the-rest-api/api-versions
